title: Sherd -> Shard
description: This resourcepack replaces the "e" in pottery sherd, into an "a," making it a pottery shard!
body:
---
Does anybody else dislike the name "Sh**e**rd?" It may be an accurate word, however it just leaves me with a sour taste. That is why I created this resource pack for you!

This resourcepack changes the "e" in the word "sherd" into an "a," thus making it a Pottery Sh**a**rd!

If you need help/have any questions my discord is linked here -> https://discord.gg/NDpRZaJNn9

Thank you for downloading!

---
